required_skills: End-to-End Customer Journey Mapping across Digital and Physical Touchpoints
Service Design and Service Blueprint Creation
Cross-channel Experience Strategy and Omnichannel Design
Qualitative and Quantitative Customer Research and Insight Synthesis
Pain Point Identification and Opportunity Framing across the Customer Lifecycle
Stakeholder Facilitation and Co-design Workshop Leadership
Experience Metrics Definition including NPS, CSAT, CES, and Customer Effort Score
Cross-functional Collaboration with CX, Marketing, Operations, and Product Teams
Prototyping and Piloting of New Service and Experience Concepts
preferred_skills: Behavioral economics and persuasion design principles
Voice of Customer (VoC) program design and management
CRM platform familiarity for customer data and lifecycle analysis
Contact center and support experience design
Digital accessibility and inclusive customer experience design
Experience design for regulated industries such as financial services, healthcare, or telecoms
Data visualization for communicating CX metrics and experience measurement dashboards
Familiarity with experience management platforms such as Medallia or Qualtrics XM
frameworks: HEART Framework (Happiness, Engagement, Adoption, Retention, Task Success)
responsibilities: Map and analyze end-to-end customer journeys across all digital and physical touchpoints, identifying key moments of truth, pain points, and high-value opportunities to elevate the customer experience
Create comprehensive service blueprints that visualize frontstage customer interactions alongside backstage processes, systems, and people required to deliver consistent and exceptional experiences

Conduct generative and evaluative customer research including interviews, surveys, ethnographic observation, and VoC data analysis to build a deep, evidence-based understanding of customer needs and expectations

Design and facilitate co-creation workshops, design sprints, and stakeholder alignment sessions that bring together cross-functional teams to ideate, prioritize, and prototype CX improvements collaboratively
Define, implement, and monitor customer experience KPIs including NPS, CSAT, CES, and churn signals, establishing measurement frameworks that connect experience quality to business outcomes
Develop richly detailed customer personas and segmentation models grounded in research, capturing behavioral motivations, emotional drivers, and contextual needs that vary across key customer groups
Prototype and pilot new service concepts, experience flows, and customer touchpoints — designing low-risk experiments that validate CX hypotheses before full organizational investment and rollout
Partner with operations, customer success, marketing, and product teams to translate CX insights and design recommendations into actionable changes across people, processes, and technology

Design omnichannel experience strategies that ensure seamless, coherent, and emotionally resonant customer interactions whether occurring via digital product, contact center, in-store, or third-party channels

Present CX research findings, journey maps, and strategic design recommendations to senior leadership and C-suite stakeholders, making a compelling business case for customer-centered investment priorities
